name: @soltrade/send-gate-contract
description: Send Gate CONTRACT + FAIL-CLOSED SKELETON (Gate E / E2-F-1): contract/skeleton only describing a send gate as a fail-closed component that ALWAYS refuses, plus a gate whose every evaluation resolves to refused. NO live calls. No RPC/provider client; no Solana/Jupiter/Helius/Jito; no transaction building/serialization; no signing/sending; no broadcast; no network; no KMS/vault; no KeyManager; no key material; no DB; no REAL-LIVE; no execution authority. This package is OUTSIDE the mechanism guard's allowlist and is fully scanned.
